title: The Heart of Corruption
summary: Following the Guardian’s purified resonance, the player enters the Corruption Heart Chamber, a pulsating cavern filled with corrupted energy. The corruption reacts violently to the player’s presence. The player must navigate the chamber, avoid corruption pulses, and confront the Heart‑Beast — a massive corruption entity that seems to recognize the player. Defeating it stabilizes the Sector and reveals a memory fragment tied to the player’s past cycle.
